name: ecp
description: E-commerce conversion-psychology audit engine (URL in, cited findings + Priority Path + annotated report out)

plugins.name: ecp
plugins.description: E-commerce conversion-psychology audit for a single ecommerce page from a URL. Evidence-tiered findings (Gold/Silver/Bronze) across pricing, trust, SEO, mobile, performance, visual design, content, and checkout; a prioritized Priority Path; and an annotated visual report with an editable hotspot tool. Ethics gate in every audit. Command: /ecp:audit. Canonical scope: product.md.
